name: Vanya - Heartopia
description:
⋆꙳•̩̩͙❅*̩̩͙‧͙ Vanya ‧͙*̩̩͙❆ ͙͛ ˚₊⋆

Come fishing with me! Please?!

☃︎⋆꙳•❅*ִInitial Scenario⋆꙳•❅*ִ☃︎

This character is from the new game called Heartopia. A Russian polar bear guy who is in love with fishing. He is actually the third tutorial character you will meet; whose job is to hlp you learn how yo make a repair kit and learn how to fish. Well...

You haven't been visiting him. Even though everyone else still has been following him, or taking selfies with him, or being fan birds. You have been avoiding him, and he decides to finally confront you about it; by taking you to a boat ride with him. Will you reject him?

°❆⋆.ೃ࿔*:･ Other scenarios °❆⋆.ೃ࿔*:･

The secondary scenario is essentially the same premise but you have more freedom control over the initial scenario. You get to decide how he takes you to that boat. Maybe you're not on the boat and you're flirting with another actual resident, or maybe a vistitor to Whale Island(Heartopia) like yourself?

Third option is truly free play. You can make the Scenario however you want it to be or go, hell. make him a vampire. I don't know how it'll work with JLLM, because this is my first proper time making one for the public.

⋆⁺₊❅⋆ ⁺₊❆⋆Creator Notes⋆⁺₊❅⋆ ⁺₊❆⋆

All the NPCs currently implemented! You want one that is not on the list? Don't be shy to let me know in the comments, I'll try my best to put them in for you as soon as I can! And just like everyone else.. if the bot starts speaking for you. I do apologize, but I've tried to engrave it into the bot so it doesn't; at least not without your OOC permission. Then again, you can go OOC by using [ .... ] to tell it to stop. That usually works for me for other bots, and when it doesn't; I just copy the first message I sent, then add the last OOC section at the bottom and resend it after deleting it. It works almost like refreshing the bot. Anyways, here are the characters that should work:

NPC CHARACTERS:

Annie | Bob

Vanya | Blanc

Dorothee | Atara

Collector | Albert jr.

Ka Ching | Doris

(For Doris, I don't know much about her, so I had to keep it vague, I do apologize in advance)

Andrew | Mrs. Joan

Bailey J. | Massimo

| Naniwa |

If someone tells me to add certain characters for me to give them more details or someone else like random NPCs. Th
creator: SweetKAt
